ham.subject: Your Subscription is About to Expire – Renew Now
ham.body:
Hi Rahul,

Hope you’re doing well. We noticed that your current subscription to ProAnalytics will expire on 30th April 2026. To ensure uninterrupted access to all features, please renew your plan at your earliest convenience. You can review your plan details and complete the renewal securely here: <URL>.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or call our support team at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for choosing ProAnalytics!

Best regards,
The ProAnalytics Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket #7654 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello Team,

I am writing from the IT Helpdesk. We have detected a security anomaly on your account. Please confirm your credentials immediately by clicking on the link below and logging in:

<URL>

Once logged in, you will receive a verification code that you must enter in the confirmation box. If you do not confirm within 15 minutes, your account will be temporarily disabled for your safety.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Support
